Instructions: To fill out the questionaire as soon as waking up.
TaskDescription: After each recording, the subjects had to answer 5 questions regarding their perceived comfort and quality of sleep.

sleepQuality.longVersion: How would you rate the quality of your sleep?

relativeSleepQuality.longVersion: How would you rate the quality of your sleep relative to a regular night?

overallComfort.longVersion: How would you rate the comfort of the ear plugs?

earEEGInfluence.longVersion: To what extent did the ear plugs influence your sleep negatively?

easeOfUse.longVersion: Were the earplugs easy or difficult to use?

longVersion: Did the subject take out ear plugs in the time between mounting and recording start?
Did the subject take out ear plugs during the sleep recording?
Did the subject have sore ears in the morning?
